== Notes for [[Item:Q101576|Q101576]] ==

Yehudah inherited the posts of personal physician and chief tax collector under Pedro I and continued in the latter capacity under Joao I.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9AFA541EFBBFA9822EF79916CB705
geni:6000000014737345048

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
